<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Nodes:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] > 5:
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"  color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)} cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Check ASCII around character
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nCharacter area (rows 29-50, cols 33-52):")
for i in range(29, 51):
    print(f"  {i}: {ascii_lines[i][33:52]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
